This Summer Bundle bag is from the Dégradé series, featuring a brand-new drawstring design that adds a summer vibe. The Monogram Empreinte embossed leather body presents a gradient tone, brightening any seasonal look. Double handles and a detachable crossbody strap offer various stylish carrying ways, making it a perfect companion for day and night. 28.0 x 20.0 x 11.5 cm (L x H x W)

items.name_cn:
💰
Top-tier original, code-changed chip M13014
This CarryAll BB Handbag is crafted from Monogram canvas, adorned with eye-catching chain embellishments and Monogram flowers, lighting up day and night with a trendy look. The leather brand and drawstring closure complement each other, while a zippered interior pocket offers convenient access for daily use.
17 x 10 x 26 cm
(H x W x D)
Monogram coated canvas
Calfskin trim
Fabric lining
Hardware
Drawstring and magnetic snap closure
Zippered interior pocket
Branding
Fits smartphone, keys, Zippy wallet, and headphones
Strap: non-detachable, adjustable
Strap half-length: 40.0 cm
Strap half-length adjustable to: 50.0 cm
Handle: single handle, detachable

items.name_en: Full metal hardware, top-tier original sample, code-changing chip. Gaston-Louis Vuitton's 1932 champagne bag meets contemporary trends, transforming into the NéoNoé bucket bag, embodying heritage beauty. Monogram canvas outlines soft lines, paired with colored leather trim and matching multi-layered glued lining. Monogram coated canvas - smooth calfskin trim - microfiber lining - center zip pocket - detachable, adjustable shoulder strap!!
